concept: I desire a game where you manage a secret bureaucratic department responsible for cataloging and containing everyday objects that have spontaneously gained sentience. Process intake forms, conduct risk assessments, and assign appropriate containment protocols for everything from rebellious toasters to existentially-confused doorknobs. Navigate office politics and budget constraints while preventing your increasingly aware filing system from orchestrating a departmental coup. Your performance evaluations depend on maintaining the delicate balance between ethical treatment of awakened objects and preventing the public from discovering this phenomenon.
